quest.009EE2933A83120B.quest_desc.original: &6W.E.R.K&r has encountered a system error, perhaps &dThe Wyrmwright&r will be able to find traces of her brother &k&6Chaos&r.
quest.009EE2933A83120B.quest_desc.translation: &6W.E.R.K&r 遇到了一個系統錯誤，\n說不定&d飛龍傳人&r有辦法找到她的兄弟「&k&6混沌&r」的蹤跡。

quest.0415C8A3274EF9D1.quest_desc.original:
You find yourself at the event horizon of a gigantic black hole. Explore the area and find &6Chaos&r.

Work with him to learn about the draconic species' most prized creation and acquire the &3Awakened Core Upgrade&r for your &6World Engine&r.
quest.0415C8A3274EF9D1.quest_desc.translation:
你發現自己正在一個巨大黑洞的視界事件中，在四周探索尋找&6混沌&r。

和這位&d回聲&r合作，了解這項龍族最重要的創造物，並協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3覺醒核心升級&r。

quest.046FCE929A728A34.quest_desc.original:
The wonders of &zInfinity&r, compressed into the form of a block.

Head back to &zInfinity&r to finalize your &6World Engine&r.
quest.046FCE929A728A34.quest_desc.translation:
&z無盡&r所創造的奇蹟已經被壓縮成方塊了。

回去和&z無盡&r交談來為&6世界引擎&r做最後的升級。

quest.0B25350118D515DF.quest_desc.original: The final upgrade for the &6World Engine&r requires the power of &zInfinity&r in block form.
quest.0B25350118D515DF.quest_desc.translation: &6世界引擎&r最終的升級需要方塊型態的&z無盡&r之力。

quest.1111B3ACEDDF5633.quest_desc.original:
If you let a &zSmall Chaos Shard&r collide into &zAntimatter&r, you might destroy your world.

Or a little totally harmless item version of the &zBlack Hole&r will plop down for you to pick up.

Let's play a guessing game!
quest.1111B3ACEDDF5633.quest_desc.translation:
如果你將&z小型混沌碎片&r和&z反物質&r碰在一起，可能會毀了你的世界。

或是啵的一聲，變成一個完全無害的&z黑洞&r物品讓你拾取。

猜猜看會變成怎樣呢？

quest.17C23A586C708425.quest_desc.original:
Once you have the &dPlutonium Pellets&r, you can craft the &6Neutron Collector&r.

This machine will generate a &zNeutron Pile&r about every 6 minutes. It's worth making a few of these unless you want to wait a while.
quest.17C23A586C708425.quest_desc.translation:
當你有了&d鈽燃料顆粒&r後，你就能做出&6中子收集器&r。

這台機器每六分鐘才會產出一個&z中子塵埃&r，如果不想要等那麼久可以多做幾台。

quest.19C9BB7952E89BA7.quest_desc.original: Now that you've shoved a &zBlack Hole&r into a container, head back to &6Radiance&r and learn how to set up the upgrade.
quest.19C9BB7952E89BA7.quest_desc.translation: 當你把&z黑洞&r塞入容器後，回去找&6輻射&r交談，他會教你如何安裝升級。

quest.1D8B2D2B03DF3256.quest_desc.original: &dThe Wyrmwright&r says crafting the &2Chronon Resonator&r will allow them to find their brother's last known location, wherever that may be.
quest.1D8B2D2B03DF3256.quest_desc.translation: &d飛龍傳人&r說合成&2時空粒子諧振器&r能夠讓他找到他的兄弟最後出現的地點，他們有可能就位於那裡。

quest.25CCA572C4D5CEA0.quest_desc.original:
The first step of &zAscension&r is to become godlike.

Equip yourself with the strongest weapon and armor known in this dimension.

Prove yourself worthy of the power of &zcreative items&r.

&eNote&r: All quests in this chapter must be completed using a &n&6Task Screen&r.
quest.25CCA572C4D5CEA0.quest_desc.translation:
&z飛昇&r的第一步就是成為無懈可擊的神。

為你自己武裝上這個維度中最強大的武器和盔甲。

證明你值得擁有&z創造模式物品&r的力量。

&e備註&r：此章節的所有任務都需要使用&n&6任務目標螢幕&r完成。

quest.25CCA572C4D5CEA0.title.translation: 飛昇階級 1 - 飄渺不定

quest.28C1BB5C88F65CA0.quest_desc.original:
With &dWyvern&r tier injectors, you should be able to create &6Awakened Draconium&r, but you'll need a &6Dragon Heart&r. Several &6Dragon Hearts&r actually.

You're going to need a ton of &6Awakened Draconium&r, so this method isn't the best way to go about making it.
quest.28C1BB5C88F65CA0.quest_desc.translation:
有了&d雙足飛龍聚合注入器&r，你就能開始製作&6覺醒龍金屬&r了，但你還需要一個（其實要很多個）&6龍族之心&r。

由於你需要超級多的&6覺醒龍金屬&r，因此這種製作方式並不是最好的方式。

quest.28F9C2B43B31DE16.quest_desc.original:
The &dAtomic Forge&f can now combine your &oEnchanted&r &5Trinity Gem&f with a pair of &oEnchanted&r &dNeutronium Ingots&f to create a &6Fortified Containment Device&f.

&eNote&f: The &5Trinity Gem&f needs Unbreaking 112 and Blast Protection 10 and the &dNeutronium Ingots&f need Unbreaking 16!

Once you have obtained the &6Containment Device&f to capture the &dAntimatter&f, it is time to create some!

Smashing the &6Containment Device&f with a highly radioactive &2Plutonium Pellet&f at a high enough speed will generate plenty of &dAntimatter&f that the &6Containment Device&f can capture into an &dAntimatter Fragment&f before it dissipates.
quest.28F9C2B43B31DE16.quest_desc.translation:
&d原子鍛造廠&f現在可以將你附魔過的&5三位一體寶石&f，與一對附魔過的&d中子錠&f結合，合成出&6強化圍阻裝置&f。

&e注意&f：&5三位一體寶石&f需要耐久 112 與爆炸保護 10，而&d中子錠&f需要耐久 16！

當你取得了用來捕捉&d反物質&f的&6圍阻裝置&f後，是時候來開始生產了！

以足夠高的速度，使具有高放射性的&2鈽燃料顆粒&f撞擊&6圍阻裝置&f，

將會產生大量的&d反物質&f，&6圍阻裝置&f能夠在它消散之前，將其捕捉成&d反物質碎片&f。

quest.309D995CCCDB3AEE.quest_desc.original: The &dWyrmwright&r has provided you with a &aChronon Battery&r infused with draconic powers, allowing this tool to access &zThe Fractured Void&r. This location is now also bound to your &2Action Pad&r.
quest.309D995CCCDB3AEE.quest_desc.translation: &d飛龍傳人&r給了你一個注入了龍族之力的&a時空粒子電池&r，你現在可以透過這項工具前往&z破碎虛空&r了。此地點也被綁定至你的&2操作面板&r了。

quest.30EE07811728D901.quest_desc.original:
The &6World Engine&r is almost to full functionality. The final step would be to create the ultimate metal.

It's time to create the &zInfinity Ingot&r.
quest.30EE07811728D901.quest_desc.translation:
&6世界引擎&r已經快恢復所有功能了，只剩下最後一步——做出終極金屬。

是時候該做出&z無盡錠&r了。

quest.322B81D896CBDF16.quest_desc.original:
&dParticle Acceleration&r is a very complex subject, but it must be done.

You will need to first create &ePlutonium Dust&r, and use that to create &dPlutonium Pellets&r.

["", {"text": "Note", "color": "yellow"},  ": Take a look at the ", {"text": "Particle Acceleration", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "2C0C63951FDED180"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Particle Acceleration Quest"}}, " quest if you want to learn more."]
quest.322B81D896CBDF16.quest_desc.translation:
&d粒子加速器&r是個非常複雜的機器，但你一定得做。

你要先做出&e鈽粉&r，才能做出&d鈽燃料顆粒&r。

["", {"text": "備註", "color": "yellow"},  "：你可以參考", {"text": "粒子加速器", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "2C0C63951FDED180"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "查看任務「粒子加速器」"}}, "這項任務了解更多關於這項裝置的操作。"]

quest.3371E3F69A27D1E5.quest_desc.original:
There seems to have been an error locating the final &dEchoes&r.

The system seems to refer to them differently to the ones you've met thus far.

Maybe &dThe Wyrmwright&r might know something...
quest.3371E3F69A27D1E5.quest_desc.translation:
看起來在尋找最終的幾位&d回聲&r時發生了錯誤。

它們位於系統中的參照值似乎與你目前遇到的所有回聲都有所不同。

說不定&d飛龍傳人&r知道一些事情...

quest.35AB3E816F51A68E.quest_desc.original:
To mass produce the enchanted books for hyper-enchanting, you might consider the &aPrinter&r or &2Enchanter&r.

A steady supply of &eLiquid XP&r and input items can create all the enchanted books you will need.
quest.35AB3E816F51A68E.quest_desc.translation:
為了大量生產用於超級附魔的附魔書，你可以考慮使用&a印刷機&r或&2附魔器&r。

穩定供應&e液態經驗&r與輸入材料，就能製造出所有你需要的附魔書。

quest.38893C57D1D9A5DE.quest_desc.original:
There are two ways to get &3Souls&f for your &aArcane Catalyst&f. These need to be within a 16-block range of a &aCatalyst&f to harvest a &3Soul&f.

1. Mob deaths will provide 1 soul each. Not all methods of killing mobs will produce souls. The Mob Crusher from Industrial Foregoing is a notable example of one that does not.

2. Growing &nand&r Breaking &aSoul Flowers&r. A fully-grown &aSoul Flower&r will produce 1 soul. Many methods of harvesting will not produce a soul because they are not actually breaking the flower.

&7&oYou will need about 350,000 soul per Antimatter Pellet.
quest.38893C57D1D9A5DE.quest_desc.translation:
有兩種方式可以為你的&a奧術催化器&f取得&3靈魂&f。

這些事件必須發生在距離&a催化器&f的 16 格範圍內，才能收集到&3靈魂&f。

1. 生物死亡時會提供 1 個靈魂。

但並非所有殺死生物的方法都會產生靈魂。

像是《工業先鋒》的生物屠殺裝置，它就不會產生靈魂。

2. 種植並「破壞」&a靈魂花&r。

一朵完全成熟的&a靈魂花&r會產生 1 個靈魂。

許多收穫方法都不會產生靈魂，因為它們實際上並沒有「破壞」花朵。

&7&o每製造一顆反物質球，大約需要 350,000 個靈魂。

quest.4094F70F627F492C.quest_desc.original: The &6World Engine&r can actually use the &zBlack Hole&r as an upgrade, but will need a container for it.
quest.4094F70F627F492C.quest_desc.translation: &6世界引擎&r實際上能用&z黑洞&r進行升級，前提是要先想辦法將它裝起來。

quest.41ED404574094D5B.quest_desc.original:
For the next step, you'll want to craft a &dDislocator&r and bind it directly on top of the &aStasis Chamber&r. Once you have the setup ready to go, head to the arena and right-click the &dDislocator&r into the &aReceptacle&r.

Hopefully the chicken will fall right into your trap.

Milking the &zMighty Ender Chicken&r will give you &zMolten Chaos&r which can be used to make &6Tiny Chaos Shards&r.
quest.41ED404574094D5B.quest_desc.translation:
下一步，你需要合成一個&d傳送符咒&r，綁定到&a靜滯室&r的上方。之後到偉大終界雞的場地，將&d傳送符咒&r放入&a定位器&r中。

希望那隻雞會落到你的陷阱中。

幫&z偉大終界雞&r擠奶後就能得到&z融化混沌&r，接著就能做出&6微型混沌碎片&r了。

quest.48EEEEDA95AD9C67.quest_desc.original:
&oTired of &eMekanism&f having the only way to produce &dAntimatter&f?

Arcane scientists figured out that a particular arcane tool can capture &dAntimatter&r produced from particle collisions.

You will first need to expand your arcane knowledge and get your hands on this magic containment vessel imbued with Otherworld energy.
{@pagebreak}
The &6Trinity Gem&f will need some additional enhancements to survive the particle collision. A very high level of Unbreaking and some Blast Protection should do the trick.

The &aArcane Catalyst&f can apply enchantments that go well beyond the normal enchantment level limits. To operate, it will require 3 things:

- A steady supply of souls collected from neary entities deaths, or from harvesting &3Soul Flowers&r nearby.

- A steady supply of the max vanilla level &2Enchanted Books&r to apply (Unbreaking III or Blast Protection IV, in this case)

- Soul Stabilization for at least 2550 souls. This is done by directing speed-upgraded &dEnderic Lasers&r at the &aArcane Catalyst&r. Speed addons allow you to store more souls per Catalyst.
quest.48EEEEDA95AD9C67.quest_desc.translation:
&o厭倦了只有《&e通用機械&f》能生產&d反物質&f嗎？

奧術科學家們發現，有一種特殊的秘法工具，可以捕捉粒子碰撞所產生的&d反物質&r。

首先，你需要擴展你的奧術知識，並取得這個注入異界能量的魔法圍阻容器。
{@pagebreak}
&6三位一體寶石&f會需要經過一些強化，才能在粒子碰撞中倖存。

極高等級的耐久，與些許爆炸保護應該就能搞定。

&a奧術催化器&f可以附加遠超常規附魔等級限制的附魔。

若想要讓它運作，你需要準備 3 樣東西：

- 穩定的靈魂供應，可以藉由收集附近實體死亡掉落的靈魂，
　或是收穫附近的&3靈魂花&r來取得。

- 穩定供應原版最高等級的&2附魔書&r（以這個情況來說，分別是耐久 III 或爆炸保護 IV）。

- 至少 2550 個靈魂的靈魂穩定度。
　這可以藉由將安裝速度升級的&d終界雷射&r，對準&a奧術催化器&r來達成。
　速度升級插件可以讓你每個催化器儲存更多的靈魂。

quest.4B576E9FFA5D79CF.quest_desc.original:
Remember that these quests said you need a lot of &6Awakened Draconium&r? You need &a378&r &6Awakened Draconium Blocks&r.

To upgrade the &6World Engine&r, you will need to create a &aTier 8 Energy Core&r which also requires &a786&r &dDraconium Blocks&r as well.

Bawk to it then.

&eNote&f: Recipes requiring this &3Upgrade&r will only work with an active &aEnergy Core&r.
quest.4B576E9FFA5D79CF.quest_desc.translation:
還記得之前的任務提到過要超級多的&6覺醒龍金屬&r嗎？準確來說你需要&a 378 個&r&6覺醒龍金屬方塊&r。

要升級&6世界引擎&r，你需要製作一個&a等級 8 能量核心&r。因此你還需要 &a786 個&r&6龍金屬方塊&r。

&e備註&r：需要用到此&3升級&r的配方需要一個已啟動的&a能量核心&r。

quest.4D7C7DE95E56C7B3.quest_desc.original:
When you fought the &zMighty Ender Chicken&r, you might have noticed a &aDislocator Receptacle&r in the arena. It's time to use that, because you have to milk the chicken.

Start by setting up a &aStasis Chamber&r setup for the boss. This might be worth doing somewhere like a &dCompact Machine&r.

The goal will be to teleport the &zMighty Ender Chicken&r onto a &aStasis Chamber&r so that you can use a &6Fluid Laser Drill&r to milk it.

&eNote&r: The chicken will teleport back if it is in the same dimension. You should set this up in a &aCompact Machine&r!
{@pagebreak}
The &aLaser Base&r needs to be placed depending on the size of the chicken that you warp over.

The goal should be to place the Base directly above the chicken's head, which if tiny, will be one block above it.

To achieve a tiny chicken, as soon as you summon it, place in the &dDislocator&r to immediately open the portal.
quest.4D7C7DE95E56C7B3.quest_desc.translation:
當你在和&z偉大終界雞&r戰鬥時，你可能就已經發現場地中有一個&a傳送門定位器&r了。現在是時候該使用它了，你需要他來幫終界雞擠奶。

首先你需要提前準備一個&a靜滯室&r來困住牠，推薦你在&d壓縮空間&r裡來做準備。

我們的目的是把&z偉大終界雞&r傳送到&a靜滯室&r上面，接著用&6流體雷射鑽&r為牠擠奶。

備註：如果在同一個維度的話，終界雞會被傳送回來，這也是為什麼推薦在&a壓縮空間&r內進行。
{@pagebreak}
根據終界雞當前的大小擺上&a雷射基座&r。基座要擺到終界雞頭部的正上方，如果雞夠小的話，直接擺到整隻雞的上方就好。

要讓雞保持在很小隻的狀態，你需要在召喚的當下馬上放入&d傳送符咒&r來啟動傳送門。

quest.4F2B35E4E3729560.quest_desc.original:
With the final upgrade in place, the &6World Engine&r has been completely restored to its full functionality.

You have now completed &6Stoneblock 4&r!
quest.4F2B35E4E3729560.quest_desc.translation:
安裝最終升級後，&6世界引擎&r就完全恢復所有功能了。

現在你已經破關《&6只有石頭的世界 4&r》了！

quest.527A754FEFC95F4C.quest_desc.original: Now that you've literally milked some &zChaos&r, it's time for you to return to the &dChaos&r &6Echoborne&r.
quest.527A754FEFC95F4C.quest_desc.translation: 當你已經擠出一些&z混沌&r了，就回去找&6混沌&r之&d回聲&r談話。

quest.543C6917A16F266C.quest_desc.original: Regardless of which path you've taken, you should now have the ability to make the &dAntimatter&f needed to craft the &zBlack Hole&f.
quest.543C6917A16F266C.quest_desc.translation:
有了&z中子活化器&r，現在你有太陽般的能量去轉換&a核廢料&r了。

之後你就能用&6超臨界移相器&r去製造&z反物質&r了。

["",{"text": "備註", "color": "yellow"},  "：想了解更多如何製作通用機械反應堆和轉換核廢料的細節可以查看", {"text": "通用機械反應堆", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "49B8310D0C7A6C55"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "查看反應堆任務"}}, "的任務。"]

在這個模組包製作&z反物質&r需要消耗的&a核廢料&r量是其他模組包的一半。

quest.5804356B2AFCF14A.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.5804356B2AFCF14A.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.580CDFD2B7675485.quest_desc.original:
To craft items in &6Draconic Evolution&r, you will need a special crafting setup called &dFusion Crafting&r.

The &dFusion Crafting Core&r must be the middle of the setup, with &dDraconium Fusion Crafting Ejectors&r placed facing towards the Core 2 blocks apart.

The Core will also need a redstone signal to start.
{@pagebreak}
To upgrade to the &dWyvern Fusion Injectors&r, you will need at least 8 &dDraconium Injectors&r placed around the Core.

You can right-click each item the injectors need to craft the upgrade. Each injector will also need power.

With all items placed in the injectors, you can place the main item in the Core, and the craft should start once it has a redstone signal.
quest.580CDFD2B7675485.quest_desc.translation:
要製作&6龍族進化&r的物品，需要經過一種叫做&d聚合&r的特殊合成步驟。

聚合裝置需要一個&d聚合核心&r在正中間，並在兩格外的地方擺上數個&d龍族聚合注入器&r。

聚合核心需要紅石信號來啟動。
{@pagebreak}
要升級成&d雙足飛龍聚合注入器&r，需要至少八個&d龍族聚合注入器&r擺在核心周圍。

右鍵點擊聚合注入器放入升級需要的物品，並為每個注入器提供能量。

當物品都擺上注入器後，將主物品放入核心中，有紅石信號時就會開始合成。

quest.5C8773D5561D7245.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.5C8773D5561D7245.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.65B10C46C1AE5026.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.65B10C46C1AE5026.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.6E24701C49A6114D.quest_desc.original:
With the &6World Engine&r upgraded with the power of the &zVoid&r, you can create the &dNeutronium Compressor&r to compact items down into &zSingularities&r.

Use these to create the &zInfinity Singularity&r.

&eNote&f: You'll need to install some &3Draconic Energy Cores&r in your &6World Engine&f to increase its energy buffer.
quest.6E24701C49A6114D.quest_desc.translation:
&6世界引擎&r安裝&z虛空升級&r過後，你現在能做出&d中子素壓縮機&r，將物品壓縮成&z奇點&r了。

現在來做出&z無盡奇點&r吧。

quest.71BDC5B453B8CAB4.quest_desc.original:
You find yourself at the event horizon of a gigantic black hole. Explore the area and find &6Radiance&r.

Work with them to create and encase your very own &dBlack Hole&r and acquire the &3Dark Void Upgrade&r for your &6World Engine&r.
quest.71BDC5B453B8CAB4.quest_desc.translation:
你發現自己正在一個巨大黑洞的視界事件中，在四周探索尋找&6輻射&r。

和這位&d回聲&r合作，製作屬於你的&d黑洞&r後把它裝起來，並協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3黑暗虛空升級&r。

quest.7C94432EFD49611F.quest_desc.original:
&zInfinity&r is the sole being holding back the collapse of reality as you know it.

Work with them to unlock the &3Infinity World Engine Upgrade&r.

&7&oIt all comes down to this.
quest.7C94432EFD49611F.quest_desc.translation:
&z無盡&r是目前正在阻止你所知的現實崩潰的存在。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3無盡世界引擎升級&r。

&7&o一切將回歸平靜。

task.061CA75E28BD6BF6.title.original: Speak with the &dEcho of The Wyrmwright
task.061CA75E28BD6BF6.title.translation: 與&d飛龍傳人之回聲&r交談

task.64B290466E13BE30.title.original: Speak with the &dEcho of The Wyrmwright
task.64B290466E13BE30.title.translation: 與&d飛龍傳人之回聲&r交談
